title: Link / Sync Updates Between Items
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: mmason (Mike Mason)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be amazing to be able to link an item on one board to an item on another board so updates on either are visible on either. We have several different teams that have boards to manage work in their team (e.g. marketing team tracks their campaign deliverables and creative team has separate boards managing their work streams and both boards have items for the same task). This would allow different teams to track the task how they need but still communicate on the task in the boards they use daily and not have to go find the task with the team they are working with.

What are you trying to achieve

Ability for teams to keep working on tasks in the boards they use for managing work in their teams and not have to jump around hunting for updates on tasks scattered all over the account.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mmason

I recommend you try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

What You Can Do with Mirror Item -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed
